blocks.speaker: Inspector Davenport
blocks.content: The door was locked from the inside.

blocks.speaker: Inspector Davenport
blocks.content: Twenty foot drop to the ground.

blocks.speaker: Julian Crane
blocks.content: Drainage line on the exterior wall. Iron brackets, spaced unevenly. The lowest one showed stress fractures consistent with recent load.

blocks.speaker: Julian Crane
blocks.content: I walked the exterior yesterday afternoon.
He looked at me the way experienced men look at things they haven't decided yet.

blocks.speaker: Inspector Davenport
blocks.content: You're saying someone used the drainage line.

blocks.speaker: Julian Crane
blocks.content: I'm saying the bracket shows recent stress. That's a fact. What it means is your question.

blocks.speaker: Inspector Davenport
blocks.content: That's a twenty foot climb in the dark.

blocks.speaker: Inspector Davenport
blocks.content: You still think someone got up there.

blocks.speaker: Julian Crane
blocks.content: The door was locked from the inside. Someone was in that room after Mr. Calloway went to bed. So either they came through the door and relocked it from the outside somehow — or they came through the window.

blocks.prompt: Davenport is listening. Is he convinced?

options.label: He believes it. He just needs more before he can move on it.
Not yet. He thinks Julian is reaching.
